channel.title: 2026-01-05 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-01-05 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Electric Field Control of Phonon Lifetimes and Thermal Conductivity in Relaxor-Based Ferroelectric
item.description:
📚 PRX Energy
👤 Puspa Upreti, Delaram Rashadfar, Raffi Sahul, Douglas L. Abernathy, Joseph P. Heremans, Raphaël P. Hermann, and Michael E. Manley
Author(s): Puspa Upreti, Delaram Rashadfar, Raffi Sahul, Douglas L. Abernathy, Joseph P. Heremans, Raphaël P. Hermann, and Michael E. Manley This study reports the electric-field control of solid-state heat flow in a relaxor-based ferroelectric material, with the implications for robust thermal switching devices. [PRX Energy 5, 013001] Published Mon Jan 05, 2026
